category_sources: source_facts.description says Solidity static analysis framework; official README says Slither is a Solidity and Vyper static analysis framework for vulnerability detectors and custom analyses.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses “Slither, the smart contract static analyzer”; source_facts.name is slither-analyzer.
docs_sources: Official README links to crytic.github.io API documentation and the project wiki for usage, detector, printer, and tool documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, but source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository and the official README shows git clone https://github.com/crytic/slither.git.
tags_sources: Official README describes Solidity/Vyper support, vulnerability detectors, smart-contract analysis, and Ethereum-oriented tooling.
